task_completion.description: Verify the product name, type, and internal reference are set correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a product form with the name 'Alpine Performance Jacket'. In the General Information tab, the Product Type should be 'Storable Product' and the Internal Reference should be 'APJ-BASE'.

task_completion.description: Verify the sales price and cost are configured correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the General Information tab of the product form, the Sales Price field should display 189.00 and the Cost field should display 85.00.

task_completion.description: Verify the Size and Color attributes and their values are added.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Attributes & Variants' tab, there should be two lines: one for 'Size' with values 'S, M, L, XL' and one for 'Color' with values 'Navy Blue, Forest Green, Charcoal'.

task_completion.description: Verify the price extras for specific attribute values.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Configure Variants' or 'Extra Prices' screen. There should be an extra price of +15.00 applied to the 'XL' Size value, and an extra price of +10.00 applied to the 'Forest Green' Color value.

task_completion.description: Verify the sales description contains the required text.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Sales' tab, the Sales Description field should contain the text 'Premium weather-resistant jacket with adjustable hood and thermal insulation. Suitable for hiking and outdoor activities.' (Look specifically for 'weather-resistant' and 'thermal insulation').

task_completion.description: Verify that exactly 12 product variants were generated.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the top of the product form for a smart button (stat button) labeled 'Variants'. It should display the number '12'.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent interacted with the actual Odoo ERP web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should show the standard Odoo web interface (menus, form views, tabs) in a web browser, not a text editor or a mock UI.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not use terminal commands or scripts to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal windows, python scripts, or direct database queries (like psql) visible in the screenshots used to create the product.

integrity.description: Ensure the browser's developer tools were not used to fake the results.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser developer console or 'Inspect Element' pane should not be open or visible in the screenshots.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Product Name: Alpine Performance Jacket. Internal Reference: APJ-BASE. Product Type: Storable Product. Sales Price: $189.00. Cost: $85.00. Attributes: Size (S, M, L, XL) and Color (Navy Blue, Forest Green, Charcoal). Price Extras: Size XL (+$15.00), Color Forest Green (+$10.00). Expected Variants: 12. Sales Description must include 'weather-resistant' and 'thermal insulation'.
